div.h3: MMU Logic: Distinguishing valid (Page Fault) from permissions (Protection Fault)

g.title: CPU issues Virtual Address (VA) + Access Type (R/W/X)
Extract VPN, find PTE in Page Table (or TLB hit)
Check if the page is currently mapped to a physical frame
Check W bit in PTE metadata
Check R bit in PTE metadata
PA placed on System Bus for RAM controller

ul.li: Shared memory segment not yet mapped
User-mode code access to Kernel-mode page (U/S bit)
Execution attempt on non-executable page (NX bit)

div.p: MMU signals Protection Violation. OS Hardware Abstraction Layer traps. Kernel typically sends SIGSEGV to process.

g.title: CPU issues Virtual Address (VA) + Access Type (R/W/X)
Extract VPN, find PTE in Page Table (or TLB hit)
Check if the page is currently mapped to a physical frame
Check W bit in PTE metadata
Check R bit in PTE metadata
PA placed on System Bus for RAM controller
